chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.36 of 2024 Hussain Versus Nawaz Ahmed Qureshi Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 530/24 2. For orders on CMA 531/24 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 532/24 Dated: 16.04.2024 None present. -.-.- On the last date appellant was present in person and today he is not in attendance. He has not even deposited the Court fee at the time of filing of this appeal. It has been about two months that this appeal is pending without it being argued and without Court fee. An application under section 149 CPC is pending, which seeks extension of time to enable the appellant to deposit Court fee, but even that is not being argued. Today is the third date of hearing and the appellant is called absent. There is no intimation either. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
